SUMNOT Free & Open License

A short statement covering the software, code and resources created by SUMNOT.

Our promise

Everything created and published by SUMNOT is provided free of charge. We do not sell software, code, access, subscriptions or licenses.

01 / FREE USE

Use it without payment.

You may use, copy and share our work for personal, educational or commercial purposes without paying SUMNOT.

02 / OPEN CODE

Read it, change it, improve it.

Our source code is open. You may inspect, modify and redistribute it, provided that you keep a clear reference to SUMNOT and include this license notice.

03 / NO WARRANTY

Provided as it is.

Our work is provided “as is”, without warranties or guarantees. You are responsible for how you use it and for checking whether it is suitable for your purpose.

04 / THIRD PARTIES

Other licenses still apply.

Third-party software, libraries and linked resources remain subject to their own licenses and terms.

About SUMNOT

SUMNOT is an independent organization based in the United Arab Emirates. We create open tools and provide useful links for an international audience.
